# libredash data revisions list

List staged managed data revisions

## Usage

```sh
libredash data revisions list [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--connection` | string | `` | project-global managed connection |
| `--limit` | int | `0` | maximum revisions to return |
| `--page-token` | string | `` | opaque page token |
| `--project` | string | `` | server project id |
| `--target` | string | `` | LibreDash server URL |
| `--token` | string | `` | API token |
